title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Teach For India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Teach For India Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Teach For India Ventures Solutions family as a Curriculum Developer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Teach For India Ventures Solutions:
Teach For India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India Ventures Solutions!
